sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57595" key="kissoxai/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κισσο-χαίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n57595.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ivy-tressed</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ivycrowned</tr_>, only in voc., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κισσοχαῖτ</foreign>' (i.e. -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαῖτ[ᾰ]</foreign>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄναξ</foreign> Pratin.Lyr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0449.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ecphantid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl> (ridiculed by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:324" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">324</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
